system.description:
Tag a targer persona with a cookie, so you can track it's Matrix activities. You must succeed in an opposed Cracking + RES vs. INT + FW test. If you succeed, the target is unknowingly carrying the cookie file. The file runs silent and is protected with a Rating equal to the Sprite's Level.

The file logs everything the icon does depending on the net hits: 1 hit provides bare outline, 4 or more a detailed report. The sprite (or its owner) sets a time when the cookie is placed, at that time the cookie transfers itself with all its logs to the sprite if it's still in the Matrix.

Cookies can be detected with a succesful Matrix Perception by the carrying persona. If identified, they can remove the file's protection and then delete it.
